arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea are among the clubs in the picture for Club Brugge’s Joel Ordóñez. Last month, we covered claims from Ecuador which stated Chelsea had sent a scout to watch the defender in action for the Jupiler Pro League side. There’s also been claims about Liverpool looking at him. arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly eyeing up two exciting winger transfer targets amid ongoing doubts over Mohamed Salah’s future at Anfield. The Reds have two big names in mind as they ponder life without Salah from next season onwards, with the Daily Briefing reporting that Napoli’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sane are both being considered. arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Girona – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool continue their Champions League campaign with a trip to face Girona on Tuesday evening. After beating holders Real Madrid last time out, Liverpool take on Spanish opposition for the second successive matchday. Arne Slot’s side top the Champions League standings, having taken maximum points from their five games.
